mapper.update: update tbl_bookmark_folder set folder_name = #{folderName}, updated_datetime = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select bf.id, bf.member_id, bf.folder_name, bf.created_datetime, bf.updated_datetime, (select count(*) from tbl_bookmark b where b.folder_id = bf.id) as bookmarkCount from tbl_bookmark_folder bf where bf.member_id = #{memberId} order by bf.created_datetime desc
